name: Richie Rich Dual-Tone Rice Chain Bracelet
details:
Product Description

Move forward with ambition while staying protected and grounded with the Richie Rich Dual-Tone Rice Chain Bracelet.

The centre features a balanced arrangement of two glossy Black Obsidian beads and two metallic Pyrite beads. Black Obsidian is placed on the outer sides, while Pyrite forms the centre, creating a clean and symmetrical dual-crystal design.

The crystals are paired with alternating gold- and silver-tone geometric rice links, giving the bracelet a bold, modern and premium appearance. The dual-tone finish makes it easy to style with gold jewellery, silver accessories, watches and everyday outfits.

StuddMuffyn’s Richie Rich concept combines Pyrite for prosperity, confidence and forward movement with Black Obsidian for grounding and protection from negativity and distractions. Together, the two crystals represent the balance between achieving success and protecting your energy along the way.

The adjustable extension chain provides a flexible wrist fit, while the lobster clasp keeps the bracelet securely fastened. Lightweight and versatile, it can be worn alone as a meaningful statement piece or stacked with a watch and other bracelets.

Key Features
Two natural Pyrite beads
Two polished Black Obsidian beads
Balanced four-bead centre arrangement
Alternating gold- and silver-tone rice links
Adjustable extension chain
Secure lobster clasp closure
Lightweight and comfortable
Suitable for men and women
Traditional Crystal Benefits

Pyrite

Associated with wealth and prosperity
Encourages confidence and ambition
Supports action and financial-growth intentions
Promotes an optimistic, success-oriented mindset

Black Obsidian

Traditionally associated with protection
Supports grounding and emotional stability
Helps shield the wearer from negativity
Encourages focus by reducing external distractions

StuddMuffyn presents this Pyrite-and-Obsidian combination as a balance of prosperity and protection. Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and are not guaranteed financial or medical outcomes.

Product Specifications

Product Type: Dual-Crystal Rice Chain Bracelet
Crystals Used: Pyrite and Black Obsidian
Number of Beads: 4
Bead Arrangement: Black Obsidian – Pyrite – Pyrite – Black Obsidian
Bead Shape: Round and polished
Chain Style: Geometric rice-link chain
Chain Finish: Gold and silver dual tone
Closure: Lobster clasp
Fit: Adjustable
Gender: Unisex
Style: Bold, contemporary and meaningful
Country of Origin: India

Ideal For

Career growth intentions, business meetings, office wear, travel, daily protection, success-focused gifting and modern crystal-jewellery styling.

Care Instructions

Keep the bracelet away from water, perfume, sweat, creams and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft, dry cloth after use and store separately in a clean jewellery pouch or box. Natural crystals may have slight variations in colour, texture and shine, making every piece unique.
